steps.title: Use parallel lines
steps.content: A system of two linear equations has no solution when the lines are parallel and have different intercepts. Parallel lines have the same slope.

steps.title: Rewrite the given line
steps.content:
Put the given equation in slope-intercept form.
$$
31ry-8x=c
$$
$$
31ry=8x+c
$$
$$
y=\frac{8}{31r}x+\frac{c}{31r}
$$

steps.title: Use the matching slope
steps.content: The other line must have the same slope as the given line, so its slope is $$ \frac{8}{31r} $$ The answer is D.
